title: HarvestNotify
description: Automatically alerts nearby players when crops in a protected radius reach full maturity, eliminating constant farm checking.
body:
# HarvestNotify

Lightweight quality-of-life plugin that monitors crop growth and notifies players when their crops mature.

**Features:**
- Tracks who planted each crop and monitors growth via BlockGrowEvent
- Sends configurable actionbar or chat notifications when crops reach full maturity
- Event-driven detection (no scheduled tasks)
- Personal notification toggle: `/harvestnotify toggle`
- Customizable alert radius: `/harvestnotify radius <blocks>` (default 100, admin-configurable max)
- Admin commands: `/harvestnotify reload`, `/harvestnotify stats`

**Supported Crops:** Wheat, carrots, potatoes, beetroot, nether wart, cocoa beans, sweet berries

**Permissions:**
- `harvestnotify.use` - Basic notifications
- `harvestnotify.radius` - Customize personal range
- `harvestnotify.admin` - Reload and stats commands

Data stored in flat file with automatic cleanup of harvested/broken crops.
